debug_info.goal:
case cons
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
elt hd : α
tl : List α
HR : ∀ {idx : ℕ} {hidx : idx ≤ l1.length}, (tl ++ l2).insertIdx idx elt = tl.insertIdx idx elt ++ l2
idx : ℕ
hidx : idx ≤ l1.length
⊢ (hd :: (tl ++ l2)).insertIdx idx elt = (hd :: tl).insertIdx idx elt ++ l2

failed_attempts:
cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ idx' =>
          have hidx' : idx' ≤ tl.length := by
            simpa [Nat.succ_le_succ_iff] using hidx
          simpa using (HR (idx := idx') (hidx := hidx'))

| succ idx' =>
          have hidx' : idx' ≤ tl.length := by

          simpa [List.insertIdx, HR (idx := idx') (hidx := hidx'), List.cons_append]
